rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is a writing-polish directive applied to a technical prose artifact; improving sentence-level clarity, word choice, flow, and paragraph cohesion is the entire load-bearing task. R1.5 sits at the boundary (0.3) because light structural tidying can accompany prose cleanup, but no structural reorganization is explicitly requested and failure there would not invalidate the delegation.
